name: Anchovy
catchphrase: I caught an anchovy! Stay away from my pizza!

name: Angelfish
catchphrase: I caught an angelfish! That other fish told me to do it!

name: Arapaima
catchphrase: I caught an arapaima! How did it get here? Arapaiknow!

name: Arowana
catchphrase: I caught an arowana! I'd make a joke but I don't 'wana.

name: Barred knifejaw
catchphrase: I caught a barred knifejaw! They must have a hard time eating!

name: Barreleye
catchphrase: I caught a barreleye! Like eyeing fish in a barrel!

name: Betta
catchphrase: I caught a betta! I betta not drop it!

name: Bitterling
catchphrase: I caught a bitterling! It's mad at me, but only a little.

name: Black bass
catchphrase: I caught a black bass! The most metal of all fish!

name: Blowfish
catchphrase: I caught a blowfish! I'm blown away!

name: Blue marlin
catchphrase: I caught a blue marlin! Listen to this fish. It's got a point.

name: Bluegill
catchphrase: I caught a bluegill! Do you think it calls me "pinklung"?

name: Butterfly fish
catchphrase: I caught a butterfly fish! Did it change from a caterpillar fish?

name: Carp
catchphrase: I caught a carp! If I catch another, they can carpool!

name: Catfish
catchphrase: I caught a catfish! I'm more of a dogfish person...

name: Char
catchphrase: I caught a char! Now I'm gonna sit on it!

name: Cherry salmon
catchphrase: I caught a cherry salmon! It's the perfect topper for a marlin sundae!

name: Clown fish
catchphrase: I caught a clown fish! How many can fit in a carfish?

name: Coelacanth
catchphrase: Blast from the past! I caught a coelacanth! Think positive! Be a coela-CAN!

name: Crawfish
catchphrase: I caught a crawfish! Or else it's a lobster, and I'm a giant!

name: Crucian carp
catchphrase: I caught a crucian carp! My skills are sharp!

name: Dab
catchphrase: I caught a dab! Not bad!

name: Dace
catchphrase: I caught a dace! Hope I have some space!

name: Dorado
catchphrase: I caught a dorado! ♪I say "Dorado", you say "Doraydo."♪

name: Football fish
catchphrase: I caught a football fish! Some countries call it a soccer fish!

name: Freshwater goby
catchphrase: I caught a freshwater goby! Time to go bye-bye!

name: Frog
catchphrase: I caught a frog! Or it's a new neighbor... and I have some apologizing to do.

name: Gar
catchphrase: I caught a gar! Yar! It's a gar! Har Har!

name: Giant snakehead
catchphrase: I caught a giant snakehead! Um...but I asked for a medium?

name: Giant trevally
catchphrase: I caught a giant trevally! Yeah, I'm pretty well-trevalled.

name: Golden trout
catchphrase: I caught a golden trout! But the real treasure? Friendship.

name: Goldfish
catchphrase: I caught a goldfish! It's worth its weight in fish!

name: Great white shark
catchphrase: I caught a great white shark! Watch out for its jaws!

name: Guppy
catchphrase: I caught a guppy! Welcome to the team, newbie!

name: Hammerhead shark
catchphrase: I caught a hammerhead shark! I hit the nail on the head!

name: Horse mackerel
catchphrase: I caught a horse mackerel! Of course, mack...er...el.

name: Killifish
catchphrase: I caught a killifish! The streams are safe again.

name: King salmon
catchphrase: WOO-HOO! I caught a king salmon! Checkmate!

name: Koi
catchphrase: I caught a koi! I don't know why it's so shy... or such a bad speller...

name: Loach
catchphrase: I caught a loach! It's...looking at me with reproach.

name: Mahi-mahi
catchphrase: I caught a mahi-mahi! It's all mahine-mahine.

name: Mitten crab
catchphrase: I caught a mitten crab! One more and I'm ready for winter!

name: Moray eel
catchphrase: I caught a moray eel! When you're in love, that's a moray!

name: Napoleonfish
catchphrase: I caught a Napoleonfish! It's not as big as it thinks!

name: Neon tetra
catchphrase: I caught a neon tetra! Wasn't hard to track.

name: Nibble fish
catchphrase: I caught a nibble fish! Come to think of it, I could use a bite!

name: Oarfish
catchphrase: I caught an oarfish! I hope I catch morefish!

name: Ocean sunfish
catchphrase: I caught an ocean sunfish! Good thing I'm wearing ocean sunscreen!

name: Olive flounder
catchphrase: I caught an olive flounder! That's not the pits!

name: Pale chub
catchphrase: I caught a pale chub! That name seems a bit judgy...

name: Pike
catchphrase: I caught a pike! Think a swordfish would be up for a duel?

name: Piranha
catchphrase: I caught a piranha! Sure hope it was the only one!

name: Pond smelt
catchphrase: I caught a pond smelt! Whoever smelt it dealt it!

name: Pop-eyed goldfish
catchphrase: I caught a pop-eyed goldfish! It looks so...surprised!

name: Puffer fish
catchphrase: I caught a puffer fish! I thought you would be tougher, fish!

name: Rainbowfish
catchphrase: I caught a rainbowfish! Where's my pot of goldfish?

name: Ranchu goldfish
catchphrase: I caught a ranchu goldfish! But I prefer balsamicu goldfish!

name: Ray
catchphrase: I caught a ray! A few more and I'll have a tan!

name: Red snapper
catchphrase: I caught a red snapper! It looks pretty dapper!

name: Ribbon eel
catchphrase: I caught a ribbon eel! Can it tie itself into a bow?

catchphrase: Wow! A saddled bichir! And me without my tiny riding crop...

name: Salmon
catchphrase: I caught a salmon! It's all upstream from here!

name: Saw shark
catchphrase: I caught a saw shark! You could call it a sea saw!

name: Sea bass
catchphrase: I caught a sea bass! No, wait—it's at least a C+!

name: Sea butterfly
catchphrase: I caught a sea butterfly! Try not to confuse it for a sea moth!

name: Sea horse
catchphrase: I caught a sea horse! But... where's its sea jockey?

catchphrase: I caught a snapping turtle! How can it snap without fingers?

name: Soft-shelled turtle
catchphrase: I caught a soft-shelled turtle! I should take a shellfie!

name: Squid
catchphrase: I caught a squid! Do they...not actually "bloop"?

name: Stringfish
catchphrase: OH MY GOSH! I caught a stringfish! Five more and I'll have a guitarfish!

name: Sturgeon
catchphrase: I caught a sturgeon! Wonder if it can perform sturgery...

catchphrase: I caught a suckerfish! I thought it was a shark! Oh, wait——now I get it. "Sucker"...

catchphrase: I caught a surgeonfish! Scalpel! Forceps! Fish hook!

name: Sweetfish
catchphrase: I caught a sweetfish! Hope it's not artificially sweet!

name: Tadpole
catchphrase: I caught a tadpole... It's just a tad small.

name: Tilapia
catchphrase: I caught a tilapia! It makes me happy-a!

name: Tuna
catchphrase: I caught a tuna! It's a little off-key!

name: Whale shark
catchphrase: Thar she blows! I caught a whale shark! I'm tellin' ya, it was thiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiis big!

catchphrase: I caught a yellow perch! Those yellow birds have to sit somewhere!

catchphrase: I caught a zebra turkeyfish! Land, air, water—make up your mind!

catchphrase: I caught an agrias butterfly! I wonder if it finds me disagrias-able?

catchphrase: I caught an ant! TELL ME WHERE THE QUEEN IS!

catchphrase: I caught an Atlas moth! I bet it never gets lost!

catchphrase: I caught a bagworm! Guess I'm a bragworm!

catchphrase: I did it! Did you see that? I caught a banded dragonfly!

catchphrase: I caught a bell cricket! It would make a great bellhop!

catchphrase: I caught a blue weevil beetle! It's the lesser of blue weevils!

name: brown cicada
catchphrase: I caught a brown cicada! Now it probably feels blue, cicada.

catchphrase: I caught a centipede! 99 more and I'll have a dollarpede!

catchphrase: I found a cicada shell! I'm glad the little guy came out of it!

catchphrase: I caught a citrus long-horned beetle! Orange you happy for me?

catchphrase: I caught a common bluebottle! I'll put it in a rare green jar!

name: common butterfly
catchphrase: I caught a common butterfly! They often flutter by!

name: cricket
catchphrase: I caught a cricket! What a chirp thrill!

catchphrase: I caught a cyclommatus stag! Those mandibles are a mouthful!

catchphrase: I caught a damselfly! Now it's a damselfly in distress!

catchphrase: I caught a darner dragonfly! It better watch its mouth!

catchphrase: I caught a diving beetle! Now I'm making a splash!

catchphrase: I caught a drone beetle! Shouldn't you have more propellers?

catchphrase: I caught a dung beetle! This species likes feces!

catchphrase: I caught an earth-boring dung beetle! It's not boring at all!

catchphrase: I caught an emperor butterfly! It's not your average monarch!

catchphrase: I caught an evening cicada! Better than an odding cicada...

catchphrase: I caught a firefly! I'm on fire now!

catchphrase: I caught a flea! The curse is lifted.

location: Flying near trash or rotten turnips
catchphrase: I caught a fly! I was just wingin' it...

catchphrase: I caught a giant cicada! I guess it's PRETTY big...

catchphrase: Whoaaa! I caught a giant stag! I'm gonna need way bigger pockets...

catchphrase: I caught a giant water bug! It should've stayed in the water!

catchphrase: I caught a giraffe stag! Does that make it a longhorn?

catchphrase: Wooooow! I caught a golden stag! Does this mean I can retire?

catchphrase: I caught a goliath beetle! Am I a legend or what?

catchphrase: I caught a grasshopper! They're a grass act!

catchphrase: I caught a great purple emperor! Its purple reign is over now!

catchphrase: I caught a hermit crab! I think it wanted to be left alone!

catchphrase: I caught a honeybee! Ah, sweet success!

catchphrase: I caught a horned dynastid! I'd hate to hear it honk that schnoz!

catchphrase: I caught a horned hercules! Guess I was stronger!

catchphrase: I caught a jewel beetle! It's a real gem!

catchphrase: I caught a ladybug! Sorry to disturb you, ma'am.

catchphrase: I caught a long locust! Or, as I call it, a looooocust.

catchphrase: I caught a Madagascan sunset moth! Wow, you're not from around here!

catchphrase: I caught a man-faced stink bug! Reminds me of my uncle!

catchphrase: I caught a mantis! Man, 'tis so cool!

catchphrase: I caught a migratory locust! Things just went south for this guy!

catchphrase: I caught a miyama stag! Its mandibles are jaw-dropping!

catchphrase: I caught a mole cricket! I really dug it!

catchphrase: I caught a monarch butterfly! Guess the butterflies are a democracy now!

catchphrase: I caught a mosquito! It's itching for a fight!

catchphrase: I caught a moth! And I had a ball doing it!

catchphrase: I caught an orchid mantis! Our friendship is blooming!

catchphrase: I caught a paper kite butterfly! Do I read it, fly it, or spread it on toast?

catchphrase: I caught a pill bug! That's a tough act to swallow!

catchphrase: I caught a pondskater! Wonder if it can do a pond ollie...

catchphrase: I caught a Queen Alexandra's birdwing! That's a feather in my cap!

catchphrase: I caught a rainbow stag! Its rainbow armor is so shiny!

catchphrase: I caught a Rajah Brooke's birdwing! Nothing else I'd rajah be doing!

catchphrase: I caught a red dragonfly! Didn't even have to roll for initiative!

catchphrase: I caught a rice grasshopper! I've been looking for a gluten-free alternative...

catchphrase: I caught a robust cicada! It DOES seem pretty lively!

catchphrase: I caught a rosalia batesi beetle! That's easier to do than say!

catchphrase: I caught a saw stag! Now I can't unsee it!

catchphrase: I caught a scarab beetle! It's just a dung beetle with better hobbies.

catchphrase: I caught a scorpion! It was a sting operation!

catchphrase: I caught a snail! It's...not much to brag about.

catchphrase: I caught a spider! I spied 'er first!

name: stinkbug
catchphrase: I caught a stinkbug! It lives up to its name!

catchphrase: I caught a tarantula! This situation just got hairy!

name: tiger beetle
catchphrase: I caught a tiger beetle! I pounced first!

catchphrase: I caught a tiger butterfly! I've earned my stripes!

catchphrase: I caught a violin beetle! Apparently I'm as fit as a fiddle!

catchphrase: I caught a walker cicada! Pffft... I walk all the time and no one calls me "Walker <Player>."

catchphrase: I caught a walking leaf! It seems to be taking it in stride!

catchphrase: I caught a walking stick! Check out its walking schtick! Look, these are the jokes, OK?

catchphrase: I caught a wasp! That's gotta sting...

catchphrase: I caught a wharf roach! This water-loving roach has no pier!

catchphrase: I caught a yellow butterfly! Shouldn't all BUTTERflies be yellow?

catchphrase: I got an abalone! Why do I want a sandwich now?

catchphrase: I got a Dungeness crab! Dun dun duuuun...geness.

catchphrase: I got a firefly squid! More like a glowswim squid.

catchphrase: I got a flatworm! Guess it forgot its spareworm.

catchphrase: I got a gazami crab! What a gripping find!

catchphrase: GAAAAH! I got a giant isopod! It's the crustodian of the sea.

catchphrase: I got a gigas giant clam! It's kind of a big deal.

catchphrase: I got a horseshoe crab! I hope it's lucky!

catchphrase: I got a lobster! Lobjective complete.

catchphrase: I got a mussel! It's been working out

catchphrase: I got an oyster! It's a little shellfish.

catchphrase: I got a pearl oyster! Aw, shucks. Don't clam up now!

catchphrase: I caught a red king crab! It's royally flushed.

catchphrase: I got a scallop! It otter be savored.

catchphrase: I got a sea anemone! The enemy of my anemone is my afrenome!

catchphrase: I got a sea cucumber! It's a bit cumbersome...

catchphrase: I got some sea grapes! Can't let these go sour.

catchphrase: I got a sea pineapple! Your move, sea pizzas.

catchphrase: I got a sea slug! It's kinda salty about that.

catchphrase: I got a sea star! Maybe it'll give me an autograph!

catchphrase: I got a sea urchin! Wasn't even 'earchin for it.

catchphrase: I got some seaweed! I couldn't kelp myself.

catchphrase: I got a slate pencil urchin! Its handwriting is gorgeous.

catchphrase: I got a snow crab! It's giving me the cold shoulder.

catchphrase: I got a spider crab! Water bugs can rest easy.

catchphrase: I got a spiny lobster! It's got a lot of backbone!

catchphrase: I got a spotted garden eel! Was it un-spotted before I saw it?

catchphrase: I got a sweet shrimp! It's being very considerate.

catchphrase: I got a tiger prawn! I ain't lion!

catchphrase: I got a vampire squid! A lot was at stake.

catchphrase: I got a Venus' flower basket! Why was she picking flowers here?
